observations.polarity: Truth spoken is perceived as noise
observations.summary: The act of speaking a foretold truth results in the speaker's message being shattered and misunderstood, heard only as worthless babble by the judged.

left_evidence.quote: When you speak, no man shall understand. Your instrument shall be shattered.

right_evidence.quote: Your tongue shall be made a heavy thing, speaking a foretold truth that is only ever heard as noise—the worthless babble of the judged.
